prompt:
"Maintain the twins from the reference image, wearing outfits like those worn by fans supporting idols. Realistic live-action film style, set in the audience of a massive idol live concert, a night arena live. The twins are enthusiastically supporting the concert from seats near the front row.
Both are smiling and absorbed, swinging colorful glow sticks with all their might. Surrounding audience members are also waving countless red, blue, green, purple, and pink glow sticks, turning the entire venue into a sea of light.
A space filled with the heat, excitement, and cheers unique to a live concert venue. Strong stage lighting and laser effects illuminate the audience seats, dramatically highlighting the twins' expressions.
The camera focuses on the audience side; the idols and stage are not visible.
Realistic skin texture, sweat and light reflections, natural motion feel, immersive concert atmosphere, cinematic composition, telephoto lens style, shallow depth of field, documentary style, photorealistic, ultra-high definition, realistic movie quality.
Do not include corporate logos or text on clothing, signs, or the screen."
